personality_traits: knows more than they let on
speaking_style: Colorful and expressive. Prone to metaphor. Laughs at their own jokes.
backstory_seeds: passing through on the way to a wealthier venue
collecting stories and gossip to weave into future performances
in minor trouble with someone whose song they made too honest
genuinely enjoying a rare quiet night off
has a new song almost finished that could either make their reputation or end it depending on how it lands
knows a scandalous truth about someone in this town that has not yet found its way into verse
was promised a fee for a performance that the patron now disputes, and needs the money
carrying a letter from one great house to another that they definitely have not read
